# Hello!

## This is the website of Lauren R and Lauren S

Our project explores whether creating your own examples helps improve understanding of difficult concepts.. Using survey data, we analyzed how often students reported making their own examples on a scale of 1-7 and compared it to their levels of understanding on a scale of 1-7. Through different visualizations such as scatterplots and density plots, we looked for patterns and trends between these variables. Our findings suggest that students who more frequently create their own examples tend to report slightly higher levels of understanding, although the relationship is not perfectly consistent. This project highlights a simple but potentially effective study strategy and emphasizes how data can be used to evaluate and improve learning behaviors.
